title: Create a GitHub Account Mission
description: Mission to create a code repository!

scenes.speech: Agent! This mission is to 'Build a Secret Base Data Bank'!
scenes.title: Mission Briefing: Data Bank Construction
scenes.content: Task: Create a GitHub account and get a 'digital safe' to store your code safely!

scenes.speech: GitHub is like a 'space locker' for your code!
scenes.title: What is GitHub?
scenes.content: GitHub is a place to store your code online. It's like a 'library' for code used by developers all around the world!
scenes.highlight:
What you can do with GitHub:
・Store and manage code
・Backup
・Share with others and collaborate
・Keep a history

scenes.speech: Always create an account with a parent or guardian!
scenes.title: Think of a safe username
scenes.content: Your GitHub username will be public. Choose a safe and easy-to-remember name!
scenes.highlight:
Rules for a safe username:
✅ Combine things you like
✅ Easy to remember
❌ Don't use your real name
❌ Don't include your school or address

scenes.speech: Register an account with a parent or guardian!
scenes.title: Account Registration Plan
scenes.content: Open GitHub.com and create an account with a parent or guardian. Never share your password with anyone!
scenes.highlight:
Steps:
1. Open github.com/signup
2. Enter your email address
3. Set a safe password
4. Choose a username
5. Complete registration!

scenes.title: Create a Repository
scenes.speech: A repo is a box for your work! 📦
scenes.content: Click '+' → New repository to create one. Names should be short, lowercase, with hyphens — that's GitHub style.
scenes.highlight:
Naming tips:
- lowercase
- hyphenated
- short and clear

scenes.title: Write a README
scenes.content: A README answers three things: what you built, how to run it, who made it. Use Markdown headers (#) and bullets (-) for clean reading.
scenes.highlight:
README 3 things:
1. What
2. How to run
3. Author

scenes.speech: Data bank construction complete! Take a screenshot of the login page and get 260 points! 🎯
scenes.title: Mission Complete!
scenes.content: You've created a GitHub data bank! Take a screenshot of the login page and submit it to Slack!
